title: bloodstained pack
description: minecraft pvp texture pack that has a bloody theme to it.
body:
minecraft pvp texture pack that has a bloody theme to it.
## Features
- Clean, simplified PvP-focused visuals
- Vibrant blood red and black theme
- Minimal visual clutter for competitive play




<details>
<summary>What the pack adds</summary>

- all netherite tools and armor
- all diamond tools and armor
- all iron tools and armor
- all gold tools and armor
- all copper tools and armor
- stone tools
- wood tools
- dark GUIs for everything
- some particles
- end crystals
- wind charges
- totem
- golden apple
- enchanted godlen apple
- xp bottle
- enchantment glint
- dark blood splattered GUI

</details>



<details>
<summary>Planing on adding:</summary>
  
- more particles
- possibly cit compadibility
- gui 2.0 update

</details>
